meta.title: Platine — Listen together
meta.description: Create a private room, add your tracks to a shared queue and listen together.

home.tagline: One room, one shared queue. Add your tracks, vote, and listen together in real time.

createModal.title: How are you listening?
createModal.subtitle: Everyone sees the clip. Only the sound changes depending on the mode.
createModal.speakerDesc: A single speaker (the host). Perfect with friends in the same place.
createModal.eachDesc: Sound on every device, synced. Remotely.

joinModal.title: Join a room
joinModal.subtitle: Enter the code shared by the host.

room.notFoundText: This room doesn't exist or was closed by its host.

panel.searchHint: Search for a track and add it to the playlist.
panel.searchEmpty: No results. Type a title then press Enter.
panel.emptySubtitle: Add a track to start the party.
panel.isHost: You are the host of this room.
